import React from "react"; import { Outlet, NavLink, useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"; import { getUser, clearSession } from "../api/storage"; const AdminShell = () => { const user = getUser(); const navigate = useNavigate(); const handleLogout = () => { clearSession(); navigate("/login"); }; const handleSwitchToUser = () => { navigate("/dashboard"); }; return (

{user.first_name?.[0] || user.username[0]}

Administrator
); }; export default AdminShell;
